song.title: This Is Amazing Grace
song.author: Jeremy Riddle, Josh Farro, Phil Wickham
song.lyrics:
[V1] .Bb Who breaks the power of sin and darkness .Eb2(no3) Whose love is mighty and so much stronger .Gm F Eb2(no3) The King of glory the King above all kings [V2] .Bb Who shakes the whole earth with holy thunder .Eb2(no3) And leaves us breathless in awe and wonder .Gm F Eb2(no3) The King of glory the King above all kings [C] . Bb Eb (Yeah) (Oh) This is amazing grace,this is unfailing love . Gm F That You would take my place, that You would bear my cross . Bb Eb You laid down Your life, that I would be set free . Gm F (N.C.) Bb Oh Jesus I sing for all that You've done for me Instrumental: .|Bb | Bb |Eb2(no3) | Eb2(no3) |
[V3] .Bb Who brings our chaos back into order .Eb2(no3) Who makes the orphan a son and daughter .Gm F The King of glory the King of glory [V4] .Bb Who rules the nations with truth and justice .Eb2(no3) Shines like the sun in all of its brilliance .Gm F Eb2(no3) The King of glory the King above all kings [B] .Bb Worthy is the Lamb who was slain .Eb2(no3) Worthy is the King who conquered the grave .Bb Worthy is the Lamb who was slain .Eb2(no3) Worthy is the King who conquered the grave .Bb Worthy is the Lamb who was slain .Eb2(no3) Worthy is the King who conquered the grave .Gm Bb Worthy is the Lamb who was slain . Eb2(no3) Worthy, worthy, worthy Ending: .|Bb |Bb |Eb2(no3) | All that You've done for me .|Bb | Bb |Eb2(no3) | Eb2(no3) |Bb |
CCLI-Liednummer 6333821 CCLI-Lizenznummer 1289104
